Champions of War

Choose Your Class

Eight paths to the throne. Each forged in a different fire.

Warden

Tank
Shield Wall Fortify Iron Will

An unbreakable bulwark of steel. The Warden holds the line when all others fall — and they have never once let it break.

Power
Defense
Speed
Magic
Utility

Shadowblade

Assassin
Vanish Backstab Shadow Step

Death from the shadows. The Shadowblade strikes before you ever see the blade — and is gone before you can scream.

Power
Defense
Speed
Magic
Utility

Ironclad

Vanguard
Juggernaut Charge Bulwark

A living siege engine clad in plate. The Ironclad breaks formations that would stop lesser warriors cold.

Power
Defense
Speed
Magic
Utility

Arcanist

Mage
Firestorm Temporal Rift Arcane Surge

Master of pure arcane force. The Arcanist bends the laws of physics and punishes anyone foolish enough to stand within range.

Power
Defense
Speed
Magic
Utility

Dreadknight

Berserker
Cleave Blood Rage Undying

Born in blood, fueled by rage. The Dreadknight grows stronger as the battle grows desperate and deadlier as allies fall.

Power
Defense
Speed
Magic
Utility

Oathsinger

Support
Hymn Aegis Resurrect

Ancient songs that mend bone and ward evil. The Oathsinger turns the tide of war without ever drawing steel.

Power
Defense
Speed
Magic
Utility

Voidcaller

Summoner
Rift Demonbind Entropy

Tears holes in reality to unleash abominations from the space between worlds. Power without limit — and without mercy.

Power
Defense
Speed
Magic
Utility

Ashwalker

Ranger
Marksman Trap Ash Veil

Patient, precise, and invisible until the moment of the kill. The Ashwalker ends battles before they begin.

Power
Defense
Speed
Magic
Utility

Every class has been honed through a thousand hours of war. Choose the one that speaks to how you fight.

Ashen Throne

A dark fantasy MMORPG set in a shattered world. Forge alliances, conquer kingdoms, and claim the throne.
